INGREDIENTS: WATER (AQUA), COCAMIDOPROPYL BETAINE, SODIUM
LAUROYL ISETHIONATE, FRAGRANCE (PARFUM), SODIUM CHLORIDE,
GLYCERIN (VEGETABLE), BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*Y,
RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL, MAURITIA FLEXUOSA (BURITI) FRUIT
OIL, ACETIC ACID (APPLE CIDER), PANTHENOL, HYDROLYZED RICE PROTEIN,
NIACIN, HYDROLYZED WHEAT PROTEIN, MENTHA PIPERITA (PEPPERMINT)
LEAF EXTRACT, YEAST EXTRACT, HYDROLYZED WHEAT STARCH, GUAR
HYDROXYPROPYLIRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL,
TOCOPHEROL, ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE, TRIFOLIUM PRATENSE
(CLOVER) FLOWER EXTRACT, SODIUM METHYL COCOYL TAURATE,
POLYQUATERNIUM-10, SODIUM ISETHIONATE, CITRIC ACID, SODIUM PHYTATE,
POTASSIUM SORBATE, SODIUM BENZOATE, CARAMEL.

*Certified Organic Ingredient ¥Fair Trade Ingredient
Some ingredients may vary in color & consistency.
